modules.name: databricks.vector_search.version
documentation: Update this when publishing a new version

classes.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the VectorSearchClient.

:param str workspace_url: The URL of the workspace.
:param str personal_access_token: The personal access token for authentication.
:param str service_principal_client_id: The client ID of the service principal for authentication.
:param str service_principal_client_secret: The client secret of the service principal for authentication.
:param bool disable_notice: Whether to disable the notice message.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient.create_endpoint
documentation:
Create an endpoint.

:param str name: The name of the endpoint.
:param str endpoint_type: The type of the endpoint. Must be STANDARD or ENTERPRISE.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient.get_endpoint
documentation:
Get an endpoint.

:param str name: The name of the endpoint.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient.list_endpoints
documentation: List all endpoints.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient.delete_endpoint
documentation:
Delete an endpoint.

:param str name: The name of the endpoint.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient.create_endpoint_and_wait
documentation:
Create an endpoint and wait for it to be online.

:param str name: The name of the endpoint.
:param str endpoint_type: The type of the endpoint. Must be STANDARD or ENTERPRISE.
:param bool verbose: Whether to print status messages.
:param datetime.timedelta timeout: The time allowed until we timeout with an Exception.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient.wait_for_endpoint
documentation:
Wait for an endpoint to be online.

:param str name: The name of the endpoint.
:param bool verbose: Whether to print status messages.
:param datetime.timedelta timeout: The time allowed until we timeout with an Exception.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient.list_indexes
documentation:
List all indexes for an endpoint.

:param str name: The name of the endpoint.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient.create_delta_sync_index
documentation:
Create a delta sync index.

:param str columns_to_sync: The columns that would be synced to the vector index with the primary key and vector column always being synced. If the field is not defined, all columns will be synced.
:param str endpoint_name: The name of the endpoint.
:param str index_name: The name of the index.
:param str primary_key: The primary key of the index.
:param str source_table_name: The name of the source table.
:param str pipeline_type: The type of the pipeline. Must be CONTINUOUS or TRIGGERED.
:param int embedding_dimension: The dimension of the embedding vector.
:param str embedding_vector_column: The name of the embedding vector column.
:param str embedding_source_column: The name of the embedding source column.
:param str embedding_model_endpoint_name: The name of the embedding model endpoint.
:param bool sync_computed_embeddings: Whether to automatically sync the vector index contents and computed embeddings to a new UC table,
                                     table name will be ${index_name}_writeback_table.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient.create_delta_sync_index_and_wait
documentation:
Create a delta sync index and wait for it to be ready.

:param str columns_to_sync: The columns that would be synced to the vector index with the primary key and vector column always being synced. If the field is not defined, all columns will be synced.
:param str endpoint_name: The name of the endpoint.
:param str index_name: The name of the index.
:param str primary_key: The primary key of the index.
:param str source_table_name: The name of the source table.
:param str pipeline_type: The type of the pipeline. Must be CONTINUOUS or TRIGGERED.
:param int embedding_dimension: The dimension of the embedding vector.
:param str embedding_vector_column: The name of the embedding vector column.
:param str embedding_source_column: The name of the embedding source column.
:param str embedding_model_endpoint_name: The name of the embedding model endpoint.
:param bool verbose: Whether to print status messages.
:param datetime.timedelta timeout: The time allowed until we timeout with an Exception.
:param bool sync_computed_embeddings: Whether to automatically sync the vector index contents and computed embeddings to a new UC table,
                                     table name will be ${index_name}_writeback_table.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient.create_direct_access_index
documentation:
Create a direct access index.

:param str endpoint_name: The name of the endpoint.
:param str index_name: The name of the index.
:param str primary_key: The primary key of the index.
:param int embedding_dimension: The dimension of the embedding vector.
:param str embedding_vector_column: The name of the embedding vector column.
:param dict schema: The schema of the index.
:param str embedding_model_endpoint_name: The name of the optional embedding model endpoint to use when querying.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient.get_index
documentation:
Get an index.

:param Option[str] endpoint_name: The optional name of the endpoint.
:param str index_name: The name of the index.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.client.VectorSearchClient.delete_index
documentation:
Delete an index.

:param Option[str] endpoint_name: The optional name of the endpoint.
:param str index_name: The name of the index.

A client for interacting with the Vector Search service.

This client provides methods for managing endpoints and indexes in the Vector Search service.

classes.name: databricks.vector_search.index.VectorSearchIndex

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.index.VectorSearchIndex.upsert
documentation:
Upsert data into the index.

```
param inputs

List of dictionaries to upsert into the index.
```

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.index.VectorSearchIndex.delete
documentation:
Delete data from the index.

```
param primary_keys

List of primary keys to delete from the index.
```

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.index.VectorSearchIndex.describe
documentation: Describe the index. This returns metadata about the index.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.index.VectorSearchIndex.sync
documentation:
Sync the index. This is used to sync the index with the source delta table.
This only works with managed delta sync index with pipeline type="TRIGGERED".

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.index.VectorSearchIndex.similarity_search
documentation:
Perform a similarity search on the index. This returns the top K results that are most similar to the query.

```
param columns

List of column names to return in the results.

param query_text

Query text to search for.

param query_vector

Query vector to search for.

param filters

Filters to apply to the query.

param num_results

Number of results to return.

param debug_level

Debug level to use for the query.

param score_threshold

Score threshold to use for the query.

param query_type

Query type of this query. Choices are "ANN" and "HYBRID".
```

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.index.VectorSearchIndex.wait_until_ready
documentation:
Wait for the index to be online.

:param bool verbose: Whether to print status messages.
:param datetime.timedelta timeout: The time allowed until we timeout with an Exception.

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.index.VectorSearchIndex.scan
documentation:
Given all the data in the index sorted by primary key, this returns the next
`num_results` data after the primary key specified by `last_primary_key`.
If last_primary_key is None , it returns the first `num_results`.

Please note if there's ongoing updates to the index, the scan results may not be consistent.

```
param num_results

Number of results to return.

param last_primary_key

last primary key from previous pagination, it will be used as the exclusive starting primary key.
```

methods.name: databricks.vector_search.index.VectorSearchIndex.__get_next_page
documentation: Get the next page of results from a page token.

VectorSearchIndex is a helper class that represents a Vector Search Index.

Those who wish to use this class should not instantiate it directly, but rather use the VectorSearchClient class.
